candidate_problem_record.subject: 数学、物理、生物、化学
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: Two hundred students were classified by sex and hostility level (low, medium, high), as measured by an HLT-test. The results were the following. If the hostility level among students were independent of their sex, then how many female students would we expect to show the medium HLT score?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。
